data.content:
The file is generated successfully but never added to the compilation. The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the `.cs` file but doesn't include it in the `Compile` item group, so Roslyn never sees it.

Fix: add the generated file to `<Compile>` items in the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a `.cs` file into the intermediate output directory, but it doesn't add the file to the `Compile` item group. The target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"`, which means it runs before compilation, but the generated file is never added to the list of files to compile.

The fix is to add a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` item after generating the file so that MSBuild includes it in compilation.

Let me also check: the file is being generated at `obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`. The target needs to add this to the `Compile` items via `<ItemGroup>` with `<Compile Include="..." />`.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>

    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly now.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target generated `GeneratedInfo.cs` into the `obj/` directory but never added it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild only compiles files explicitly listed in `<Compile>` items (or auto-globbed from the project directory — `obj/` is excluded by default).

**Fix:** Added `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` inside the target so the generated file is included in compilation.
